2605.23118.title: Exploiting Longitudinal Context in Clinician-Verified Interactive Lesion Tracking
2605.23118.paper_summary: Tracking tumor lesions across serial CT scans is essential for oncological response assessment. Existing automated methods face a fundamental trade-off: end-to-end trackers achieve high automation but offer no opportunity to correct silent tracking failures, while decoupled registration-segmentation pipelines permit user verification yet discard the lesion's prior appearance, limiting accuracy in ambiguous cases. In this work, we propose a Verified Tracking paradigm: a clinician verifies a registration-proposed prompt, which the model leverages alongside the baseline lesion appearance to resolve segmentation ambiguities. We present a unified framework combining early spatial prompt fusion with latent temporal difference weighting for longitudinally-informed segmentation. To address data scarcity, we leverage large-scale synthetic pretraining, proving essential for exploiting longitudinal context, improving performance by up to 4.5 Dice points over training from scratch. Our approach secured first place in the MICCAI autoPET IV challenge. We further curate and release PanTrack, a new longitudinal pancreatic cancer benchmark, to assess out-of-distribution generalization. Experiments show that our model outperforms prior work in both fully automatic and the proposed verified tracking setting offering a clinically safe middle ground between automation and control. Code, model and dataset will be released at https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/LongiSeg
2605.23118.paper_summary_zh: 追蹤連續 CT 掃描中的腫瘤病灶對於腫瘤反應評估至關重要。現有的自動化方法面臨一個根本性的權衡：端到端的追蹤器實現了高度自動化，但無法糾正靜默的追蹤失敗，而解耦的註冊-分割管道則允許用戶驗證，但丟棄了病灶的先前外觀，限制了在模糊情況下的準確性。在這項工作中，我們提出了一種驗證追蹤範式：臨床醫生驗證註冊提出的提示，模型利用該提示與基線病灶外觀一起解決分割模糊性。我們提出了一個統一的框架，結合早期空間提示融合和潛在時間差加權，以進行縱向信息驅動的分割。為了解決數據稀缺問題，我們利用大規模合成預訓練，這對於利用縱向上下文至關重要，性能提升高達 4.5 Dice 點，相較於從頭開始訓練。我們的方法在 MICCAI autoPET IV 挑戰中獲得了第一名。我們進一步策劃並發布了 PanTrack，一個新的縱向胰腺癌基準，以評估分佈外的泛化能力。實驗表明，我們的模型在完全自動化和提出的驗證追蹤設置中均優於先前的工作，提供了一個在自動化和控制之間臨床安全的中間地帶。代碼、模型和數據集將在 https://github.com/MIC-DKFZ/LongiSeg 發布。
2605.23118.author: Yannick Kirchhoff et.al.
2605.23118.authors: Yannick Kirchhoff, Maximilian Rokuss, Daniel Philipp Mertens, David Füller, Benjamin Hamm, Andreas Schreyer, Oliver Ritter, Klaus Maier-Hein
